title: DonutSmp Reverse Update
description: Bring back DonutSMP's classic chest menus. Reverse update re-skins the new dialog UI Friends, Orders, Homes, Settings & more into the clean GUIs you knew. Client-side only, nothing changes but the look.
body:
Reverse Update re-skins DonutSMPŌĆÖs reworked server menus into the tidy double-chest GUIs you already know ŌĆö with real item icons, player heads, and proper tooltips.

**Client-side only:** every click still talks to the server exactly as before. Nothing about gameplay changes ŌĆö it just *looks* right again.

---

## Features

### Main Menu

* Clean **5├Ś2 chest-style icon grid**
* Replaces the long button list
* Open with `G`

### Friends

* Real player heads with skins
* Oak-sign search UI
* Clean glass-pane accept/decline buttons

### Orders

#### Choose Item

* Paginated chest GUI
* True item icons
* Correctly tinted:

  * Potions
  * Tipped arrows
  * Bottles

#### Search

* Familiar sign editor input

#### Create Order

* Item, quantity, and price on **one screen**
* Single confirm button
* Supports:

  * `K`
  * `M`
  * `B`
    amount formats
* Minimum price enforced automatically

#### Enchantments

* Selected using enchanted books
* Grouped by enchantment type

#### Review

* Clean order summary
* Displays item enchantments properly

### Homes

* Beds for set homes
* Your chosen home icons displayed correctly
* Black glass for empty slots
* Red glass for locked slots
* Tidy manage screen with:

  * Teleport
  * Rename
  * Delete
* Home renaming uses a sign editor

### Settings

* Every option on a **single screen**
* Thematic icons
* Clear ON/OFF states

### Stats & Leaderboards

* Baltop-style player heads
* Relevant stat/value shown directly

---

## Compatibility

* **Minecraft:** `1.21.6 - 1.21.11`
* **Mod Loader:** Fabric
* Requires: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

---

## Installation

1. Install Fabric Loader
2. Install Fabric API
3. Drop Reverse Update into your `mods` folder

ThatŌĆÖs it ŌĆö the re-skins apply automatically whenever a supported menu opens.

No setup. No config. No server install required.

---

## Disclaimer

*DonutSmp Reverse Update is an unofficial, fan-made mod. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with DonutSMP.*

*This mod only changes how menus look on your own client.*
